As part of its ongoing Alienware gaming laptop sale, Dell is now offering a well-equipped Aurora 16X configuration with an RTX 5070 Ti for $2,629.99 shipped. That’s $750 off its regular $3,380 price tag and one of the better discounts we’ve seen on this particular model. This configuration packs Intel’s Core Ultra 9 290HX processor, 32GB of RAM, and an OLED display, among other things, making it a strong option for both gaming and demanding productivity workloads. While lower-end Aurora 16X variants have dropped down to a lower price point in the past, this specific config is now at its best price yet. It’s also the highest-end GPU configuration available in the Aurora lineup before stepping up to the pricier Area-51 series with RTX 5080 graphics. Head below for a closer look.

items.title: Anker’s SOLIX Early Prime flash sale offers hundreds in power station savings + FREE gifts starting from $399
items.summary:
Anker has officially begun its Early Prime Day Sale event, and just like we saw with EcoFlow and Jackery, the brand is also offering a starting 48-hour flash sale on six varying units. One notable return for the second time in 2026 is Anker’s SOLIX F2000 2,08Wh Portable Power Station for $799 shipped, which is one of the few offers not benefiting from our exclusive bonus savings code 9TO5DEALS5, but does still beat out its Amazon pricing by $101. Before the end of May this station carried a $1,999 MSRP, but recently the brand permanently cut prices to match market rates, meaning it only has an $899 MSRP these days. Previously discounts in 2026 took costs down as low as $850, $800, and $799, with that all-time low price coming back around here with $100 savings ($1,200 off the original MSRP). You can head down below to browse the full lineup of flash offers while they last through June 11.
